guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 53. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_sm: Point to the big SM and say: smsmsm. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_sn: Now point to the big SN and say: snsnsn.

parent_story: A happy boy had a big smile. Snail ran slow in the white snow.
